tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts exists with 7 complete interface definitions

tasks.name: Implement loadCourseProgress helper function
tasks.purpose: Query course_progress table and map to CourseProgressData interface

constraints: Use .maybeSingle() for optional single-row query
Handle errors gracefully - return null on failure
Query must be RLS-protected (no admin client)
Include current_lesson_id and completion_percentage

tasks.input_state: Helper function stub exists returning null
tasks.output_state: Helper function queries course_progress table, returns CourseProgressData or null on error
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Function queries course_progress with user filter, returns typed data, handles errors with null return, compiles without errors
tasks.verification_command: pnpm typecheck && grep -A 20 'async function loadCourseProgress' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-page.loader.ts | grep -E '(from\(|maybeSingle|catch)'
